error.auth: Authentication failed – check the API token
error.permission: Permission denied – check the token privileges
error.not_found: Resource not found on the Proxmox server

pair.verifyTlsHint: Leave off for the default self-signed Proxmox certificate.
pair.missingFields: Please fill in host, token ID and token secret.

settings.title: Default connection
settings.subtitle: These values pre-fill the pairing screen when adding a new device.

balance.title: Automatic disk balancing
balance.subtitle: Move the largest movable disk off a full storage to an emptier one on the same node. Requires at least one paired device per server. Test with dry-run first.
balance.includeNetworkHint: Off by default — network shares (NFS, CIFS/SMB, GlusterFS, CephFS) are never used as a move target.
balance.excludeHint: Comma-separated storage names to exclude as a move target.
